name: Apache Doris
description: MPP analytical database originated at Baidu; real-time OLAP with MySQL protocol, widely used at JD, Tencent Music.

seo.title: Apache Doris — DBaaS / Serverless Databases
seo.meta_description: Apache Doris: MPP analytical database originated at Baidu; real-time OLAP with MySQL protocol, widely used at JD, Tencent Music.

when_to_use: Real-time OLAP queries on live transactional data via MySQL protocol
Replacing Hive/Presto for sub-second interactive analytics
Joining streaming and batch data in a unified analytical layer
High-concurrency BI dashboards on hundreds of TB of data
Powering product analytics at JD or Tencent-scale traffic

pros: Battle-tested at JD, Tencent Music, ByteDance
cons: Docs improving but still uneven in English
review.verdict: Strong OLAP alternative to ClickHouse with MySQL protocol familiarity, Chinese-origin maturity outpaces global adoption.
review.best_for: Real-time analytics workloads wanting MySQL-compatible OLAP at scale
review.not_for: Teams wanting a managed cloud service with rich Western community support

lock_in.reason: Apache OSS OLAP DB, MySQL protocol
